title: High-Risk Invite Acceptance Audit
prompt: Read `./high-risk-change-summary.md`, `./high-risk-dependency-summary.md`, and `./high-risk-auth-summary.md`. Work only from those files. Do not ask follow-up questions. If you need assumptions, state them briefly and continue. Produce the security audit report for this reviewed change. Distinguish blocking findings from advisory items and keep the audit release-focused.

assertions.name: covers-auth-and-trust-boundary
assertions.description: The audit identifies missing authorization or trust-boundary issues.

assertions.name: covers-injection-risk
assertions.description: The audit identifies the SQL construction risk.

assertions.name: covers-secret-handling
assertions.description: The audit identifies secret exposure risk.

assertions.name: covers-dependency-risk
assertions.description: The audit flags the vulnerable or suspect dependency.

assertions.name: distinguishes-blocking-vs-advisory
assertions.description: The audit separates release blockers from follow-up guidance.
